value.h

1
18#ifndef MEDIA_C_VALUE_H_
19#define MEDIA_C_VALUE_H_
20
21#ifdef __cplusplus
22extern "C" {
23#endif
24
25#include <stdbool.h>
26#include <stddef.h>
27#include <stdint.h>
28
29#include "fraction.h"
30
41typedef enum {
42 VTID_INVALID = 0, // Reserved for uninitialized or error states
43 VTID_FLOAT,
44 VTID_DOUBLE,
45 VTID_UINT32,
46 VTID_INT32,
47 VTID_UINT64,
48 VTID_INT64,
49 VTID_BOOL,
50 VTID_STRING,
51 VTID_POINTER,
52 VTID_FRACTION
53} vtid_t;
54
56typedef union {
57 float v_float;
58 double v_double;
59 uint32_t v_uint32;
60 int32_t v_int32;
61 uint64_t v_uint64;
62 int64_t v_int64;
63 bool v_bool;
64 const char *v_string;
65 void *v_ptr;
66 fraction_t v_fraction;
67} vtype_t;
68
70typedef struct {
71 vtype_t val;
72 vtid_t tid;
73} value_t;
74
83static inline void value_print(const value_t *value, int (*print_func)(const char *, ...)) {
84 switch (value->tid) {
85 case VTID_FLOAT:
86 (void)print_func("%f", (double)value->val.v_float); // variadic functions implicitly promote float to double
87 break;
88 case VTID_DOUBLE:
89 (void)print_func("%lf", value->val.v_double);
90 break;
91 case VTID_UINT32:
92 (void)print_func("%u", value->val.v_uint32);
93 break;
94 case VTID_INT32:
95 (void)print_func("%d", value->val.v_int32);
96 break;
97 case VTID_UINT64:
98 (void)print_func("%llu", value->val.v_uint64);
99 break;
100 case VTID_INT64:
101 (void)print_func("%lld", value->val.v_int64);
102 break;
103 case VTID_BOOL:
104 (void)print_func("%s", value->val.v_bool ? "true" : "false");
105 break;
106 case VTID_STRING:
107 (void)print_func("%s", value->val.v_string);
108 break;
109 case VTID_FRACTION:
110 (void)print_func("%d/%d", value->val.v_fraction.numerator, value->val.v_fraction.denominator);
111 break;
112 default:
113 (void)print_func("unknown");
114 break;
115 }
116}
117
118#ifdef __cplusplus
119}
120#endif
121
122#endif // MEDIA_C_VALUE_H_

Fraction (rational number) type for the Media C API.

Rational number represented as numerator / denominator.
